name: Rewards
author: Wertzui123
description: A (daily) reward plugin for PocketMine-MP servers.
readme_markdown:
# Rewards
A (daily) reward plugin for PocketMine-MP servers.
The .phar can be found on poggit. # Commands **/reward:**
Command to claim your reward
Can be edited in the config.yml
Permission: rewards.command.reward # Permissions ## Commands rewards.command.reward | Permission for /reward
Default: true ## Other rewards.waiting.bypass | Allows you to bypass the waiting time
Default: op # Features Main Rewards features: * Nearly everything can be adjusted in the configs * Rewards can be only claimed after a waiting time or with the bypass permission * Multiple commands to run on /reward * Config updater * Multiple permission groups * Reward streaks * Multiple data storage providers # Support You can contact me in my discord server or create an issue. # License and Copyright Rewards is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. For more information: https://choosealicense.com/licenses/gpl-3.0
© 2019 - 2023 Wertzui123 # Credits Rewards was written by @Wertzui123, the icon was designed by @rrritschi and the chest in the logo is from freepik.com.
